title: Ching-Hua Kuo
text: Home * People * Ching-Hua Kuo Ching-Hua Kuo , a Taiwanese computer scientist affiliated with the Department of Computer Science and Information Engineering, National Chiao Tung University , Hsinchu . As member of the Computer Games and Intelligence (CGI) laboratory headed by professor I-Chen Wu , Ching-Hua Kuo is co-author of the Chinese Chess engine Chimo [1] , and co-author of the Nonogram solver LalaFrogKK . Selected Publications [ edit ] [2] I-Chen Wu , Der-Johng Sun , Lung-Ping Chen , Kan-Yueh Chen , Ching-Hua Kuo , Hao-Hua Kang , Hung-Hsuan Lin ( 2013 ). An Efficient Approach to Solving Nonograms . IEEE Transactions on Computational Intelligence and AI in Games , Vol. 5, No. 3 Wen-Jie Tseng , Jr-Chang Chen , I-Chen Wu , Ching-Hua Kuo , Bo-Han Lin ( 2013 ).
